Example

Class Course

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API.dll

A course represents the course of treatment that a patient will be given. Every patient must have a course, and all plans always belong to a course.

public class Course : ApiDataObject, IXmlSerializable
Inheritance
object
SerializableObject
ApiDataObject
Course
Implements
IXmlSerializable

Properties

BrachyPlanSetups

A collection of brachytherapy plans for the course.

public IEnumerable<BrachyPlanSetup> BrachyPlanSetups { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<BrachyPlanSetup>

ClinicalStatus

Clinical Status of Course.

public CourseClinicalStatus ClinicalStatus { get; }

Property Value

CourseClinicalStatus

Comment

[Availability of this property depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] A comment about the Course.

public string Comment { get; set; }

Property Value

string

CompletedDateTime

The date and time when the course was completed.

public DateTime? CompletedDateTime { get; }

Property Value

DateTime?

Diagnoses

The diagnoses that are attached to the course.

public IEnumerable<Diagnosis> Diagnoses { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<Diagnosis>

ExternalPlanSetups

A collection of external beam plans for the course.

public IEnumerable<ExternalPlanSetup> ExternalPlanSetups { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<ExternalPlanSetup>

Id

[Availability of this property depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] The identifier of the Course.

public string Id { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Intent

The intent of the course.

public string Intent { get; }

Property Value

string

IonPlanSetups

A collection of proton plans for the course.

public IEnumerable<IonPlanSetup> IonPlanSetups { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<IonPlanSetup>

Patient

Patient in which the course is defined.

public Patient Patient { get; }

Property Value

Patient

PlanSetups

A collection of plans for the course. The plans can be of any type (external beam or brachytherapy).

public IEnumerable<PlanSetup> PlanSetups { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<PlanSetup>

PlanSums

A collection of plan sums for the course.

public IEnumerable<PlanSum> PlanSums { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<PlanSum>

StartDateTime

The date and time when the course was started.

public DateTime? StartDateTime { get; }

Property Value

DateTime?

TreatmentPhases

All treatment phases in the course.

public IEnumerable<TreatmentPhase> TreatmentPhases { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<TreatmentPhase>

TreatmentSessions

Treatment sessions of the course.

public IEnumerable<TreatmentSession> TreatmentSessions { get; }

Property Value

IEnumerable<TreatmentSession>

Methods

AddBrachyPlanSetup(StructureSet, Structure, ReferencePoint, DoseValue, BrachyTreatmentTechniqueType, IEnumerable<ReferencePoint>)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Attaches a new brachytherapy plan to this course with the target structure, primary reference point and additional reference points specified in arguments.

public BrachyPlanSetup AddBrachyPlanSetup(StructureSet structureSet, Structure targetStructure, ReferencePoint primaryReferencePoint, DoseValue dosePerFraction, BrachyTreatmentTechniqueType brachyTreatmentTechnique, IEnumerable<ReferencePoint> additionalReferencePoints = null)

Parameters

structureSet StructureSet

Valid StructureSet to be connected to the plan

targetStructure Structure

Target structure. If defined, the value must be from 'structureSet'. If the value is null, the target will remain unset.

primaryReferencePoint ReferencePoint

Valid reference point to be connected as primary reference point.

dosePerFraction DoseValue

Dose per fraction

brachyTreatmentTechnique BrachyTreatmentTechniqueType

Brachytherapy treatment technique

additionalReferencePoints IEnumerable<ReferencePoint>

Collection of additional valid reference points

Returns

BrachyPlanSetup

New brachytherapy plan with primary reference point and target structure set as specified in arguments.

AddBrachyPlanSetup(StructureSet, DoseValue, BrachyTreatmentTechniqueType)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Attaches a new brachytherapy plan to this course. A new primary reference point is always created for the new brachytherapy plan.

public BrachyPlanSetup AddBrachyPlanSetup(StructureSet structureSet, DoseValue dosePerFraction, BrachyTreatmentTechniqueType brachyTreatmentTechnique)

Parameters

structureSet StructureSet

A valid StructureSet to be connected to the plan.

dosePerFraction DoseValue

Dose per fraction

brachyTreatmentTechnique BrachyTreatmentTechniqueType

Brachytherapy treatment technique

Returns

BrachyPlanSetup

A new brachytherapy plan.

AddExternalPlanSetup(StructureSet)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Attaches a new plan to this course. A new primary reference point is always created for the new plan.

public ExternalPlanSetup AddExternalPlanSetup(StructureSet structureSet)

Parameters

structureSet StructureSet

A valid structure set.

Returns

ExternalPlanSetup

A new plan.

AddExternalPlanSetup(StructureSet, Structure, ReferencePoint, IEnumerable<ReferencePoint>)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Attaches a new plan to this course with target, primary reference point and additional reference points in arguments

public ExternalPlanSetup AddExternalPlanSetup(StructureSet structureSet, Structure targetStructure, ReferencePoint primaryReferencePoint, IEnumerable<ReferencePoint> additionalReferencePoints = null)

Parameters

structureSet StructureSet

Valid StructureSet to connected with the plan

targetStructure Structure

Target structure, if defined must be from 'structureSet', if left null target will remain unset.

primaryReferencePoint ReferencePoint

Valid reference point to be connected as primary.

additionalReferencePoints IEnumerable<ReferencePoint>

Collection of additional valid reference points

Returns

ExternalPlanSetup

New external beam plan with primary reference point, additional reference points, target structure set as specified in arguments.

AddExternalPlanSetupAsVerificationPlan(StructureSet, ExternalPlanSetup)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Attaches a new verification plan to this course and adds the relationship between the verified plan and a new plan. Data is not copied from the verified plan. A new primary reference point is always created for the new plan.

public ExternalPlanSetup AddExternalPlanSetupAsVerificationPlan(StructureSet structureSet, ExternalPlanSetup verifiedPlan)

Parameters

structureSet StructureSet

A valid structure set.

verifiedPlan ExternalPlanSetup

The verified plan.

Returns

ExternalPlanSetup

A new verification plan.

AddIonPlanSetup(StructureSet, string)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Attaches a new proton plan to this course.

public IonPlanSetup AddIonPlanSetup(StructureSet structureSet, string patientSupportDeviceId)

Parameters

structureSet StructureSet

A valid structure set.

patientSupportDeviceId string

Id of the patient support device.

Returns

IonPlanSetup

A new proton plan.

AddIonPlanSetup(StructureSet, Structure, ReferencePoint, string, IEnumerable<ReferencePoint>)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Attaches a new proton plan to this course.

public IonPlanSetup AddIonPlanSetup(StructureSet structureSet, Structure targetStructure, ReferencePoint primaryReferencePoint, string patientSupportDeviceId, IEnumerable<ReferencePoint> additionalReferencePoints = null)

Parameters

structureSet StructureSet

A valid structure set.

targetStructure Structure

Target structure. If defined, the value must be from 'structureSet'. If the value is null, the target will remain unset.

primaryReferencePoint ReferencePoint

Valid reference point to be connected as primary.

patientSupportDeviceId string

Id of the patient support device.

additionalReferencePoints IEnumerable<ReferencePoint>

Collection of additional valid reference points

Returns

IonPlanSetup

New proton plan with primary reference point, additional reference points and target structure set as specified in arguments.

AddIonPlanSetupAsVerificationPlan(StructureSet, string, IonPlanSetup)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Attaches a new verification plan to this course and adds the relationship between the proton plan to be verified and the new verification plan. Data is not copied from the verified plan. A new primary reference point is always created for the new plan.

public IonPlanSetup AddIonPlanSetupAsVerificationPlan(StructureSet structureSet, string patientSupportDeviceId, IonPlanSetup verifiedPlan)

Parameters

structureSet StructureSet

A valid structure set.

patientSupportDeviceId string

Id of the patient support device.

verifiedPlan IonPlanSetup

The verified plan.

Returns

IonPlanSetup

A new proton verification plan.

CanAddPlanSetup(StructureSet)

Checks if a new plan can be added to this course using the given structure set.

public bool CanAddPlanSetup(StructureSet structureSet)

Parameters

structureSet StructureSet

The structure set used by the plan.

Returns

bool

true if a new plan can be added.

CanRemovePlanSetup(PlanSetup)

Checks if the plan setup can be removed from this course.

public bool CanRemovePlanSetup(PlanSetup planSetup)

Parameters

planSetup PlanSetup

The plan setup to check.

Returns

bool

true if the plan can be removed.

CopyBrachyPlanSetup(BrachyPlanSetup, StringBuilder)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Copies brachytherapy plan (the planning image will be the same for both plans).

public BrachyPlanSetup CopyBrachyPlanSetup(BrachyPlanSetup sourcePlan, StringBuilder outputDiagnostics)

Parameters

sourcePlan BrachyPlanSetup

Brachy plan to copy from

outputDiagnostics StringBuilder

Information about copying, this needs to be shown to the user.

Returns

BrachyPlanSetup

New plan

CopyBrachyPlanSetup(BrachyPlanSetup, StructureSet, StringBuilder)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Copies brachytherapy plan from sourcePlan to the target Image associated with the given structure set. TargetImage must be registered with the primary image of the sourcePlan. First copies image and then changes planning image.

public BrachyPlanSetup CopyBrachyPlanSetup(BrachyPlanSetup sourcePlan, StructureSet structureset, StringBuilder outputDiagnostics)

Parameters

sourcePlan BrachyPlanSetup

Brachy plan to copy from

structureset StructureSet

The structure set along with its associated image that will be assigned to the copied plan

outputDiagnostics StringBuilder

Information about copying, this needs to be shown to the user.

Returns

BrachyPlanSetup

New plan

CopyPlanSetup(PlanSetup)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Copies plan (the planning image will be the same for both plans).

public PlanSetup CopyPlanSetup(PlanSetup sourcePlan)

Parameters

sourcePlan PlanSetup

Plan to copy from

Returns

PlanSetup

New plan

CopyPlanSetup(PlanSetup, Image, StringBuilder)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Copies plan from sourcePlan to targetImage. targetImage must be registered with primary image of the sourcePlan. First copies image and then changes planning image. If there are multiple registrations, just copies isocenter locations and shows a message about this.

public PlanSetup CopyPlanSetup(PlanSetup sourcePlan, Image targetImage, StringBuilder outputDiagnostics)

Parameters

sourcePlan PlanSetup

Plan to copy from

targetImage Image

Image to copy plan to

outputDiagnostics StringBuilder

Information about copying, this needs to be shown to the user.

Returns

PlanSetup

New plan

CopyPlanSetup(PlanSetup, Image, Registration, StringBuilder)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Copies plan from sourcePlan to targetImage. targetImage must be registered with primary image of the sourcePlan. First copies image and then changes planning image.

public PlanSetup CopyPlanSetup(PlanSetup sourcePlan, Image targetImage, Registration registration, StringBuilder outputDiagnostics)

Parameters

sourcePlan PlanSetup

Plan to copy from

targetImage Image

Image to copy plan to

registration Registration

Registration to use to map geometry from source to target

outputDiagnostics StringBuilder

Information about copying, this needs to be shown to the user.

Returns

PlanSetup

New plan

CopyPlanSetup(PlanSetup, StructureSet, StringBuilder)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Copies plan from sourcePlan to the target Image associated with the given structure set. TargetImage must be registered with primary image of the sourcePlan. First copies image and then changes planning image.

public PlanSetup CopyPlanSetup(PlanSetup sourcePlan, StructureSet structureset, StringBuilder outputDiagnostics)

Parameters

sourcePlan PlanSetup

Plan to copy from

structureset StructureSet

The structure set along with its associated image that will be assigned to the copied plan

outputDiagnostics StringBuilder

Information about copying, this needs to be shown to the user.

Returns

PlanSetup

New plan

CreatePlanSum(IEnumerable<PlanningItem>, Image)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Creates a plan sum from given planning items.

public PlanSum CreatePlanSum(IEnumerable<PlanningItem> planningItems, Image image)

Parameters

planningItems IEnumerable<PlanningItem>

Items to create sum from. All plans must share the same image, otherwise please use CopyPlanSetup method before adding plan to Plan sum.

image Image

Plan Sum image

Returns

PlanSum

Plan sum if creation was possible.

IsCompleted()

Checks if the clinical status of the course is completed or restored.

public bool IsCompleted()

Returns

bool

true if the clinical status of the course is completed or restored.

RemovePlanSetup(PlanSetup)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Removes the plan setup from the database. Use CanRemovePlanSetup to check if it is possible to remove the plan. The PlanSetup object given as a parameter is not usable anymore after this operation.

public void RemovePlanSetup(PlanSetup planSetup)

Parameters

planSetup PlanSetup

The plan setup that is removed.

RemovePlanSum(PlanSum)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Removes the plan sum from the database. The PlanSum object given as a parameter is not usable anymore after this operation.

public void RemovePlanSum(PlanSum planSum)

Parameters

planSum PlanSum

The plan sum that is removed.

WriteXml(XmlWriter)

Converts an object into its XML representation. For more information on how to serialize an object into an XML document, see System.Xml.Serialization.XmlSerializer.

public override void WriteXml(XmlWriter writer)

Parameters

writer XmlWriter

The System.Xml.XmlWriter stream, to which the object is serialized.
